money_flow_summary: Audiences pay with attention; advertisers pay with dollars. AI collapsed content production cost 90%+ — a solo operator can produce the output of a 10-person media company.

opportunities.title: Content Localization SaaS (YouTube → 12 Languages)
opportunities.how_money_is_made: Takes a YouTube video, transcribes, translates into 12 languages, generates dubbed audio in creator's voice clone, adds subtitles, uploads localized versions to 12 regional channels — automated. Charge $99–$499/mo.
opportunities.moat: Voice clone is creator-specific; high setup investment creates retention
opportunities.first_step: Build YouTube API + Whisper + ElevenLabs voice clone pipeline; demo with 1 creator's video in 3 languages
opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI voice cloning creates creator voice in 12 languages from 5 min of audio — impossible without $100k+ studio 18 months ago

competitors.name: Rask AI
competitors.weakness: Basic dubbing; no YouTube auto-upload; quality issues with lip sync; $60–$290/mo; limited languages

competitors.name: HeyGen
competitors.weakness: Avatar-focused, not creator voice cloning; manual workflow; no batch processing

opportunities.gap: Rask AI and similar tools do basic translation but don't auto-upload localized videos to regional YouTube channels and manage the entire multi-channel operation. The full closed-loop automation is missing.
poc_steps: Generate Spanish audio with ElevenLabs cloned voice (5 min of original audio needed)
Manually upload + show the creator the Spanish version

opportunities.title: Podcast Clip Automation Service
opportunities.how_money_is_made: Takes podcast RSS feed, downloads episodes, transcribes, identifies 5 most shareable 60–90 sec clips via LLM, generates captions, creates formatted social posts. Charge $99–$299/mo. 4M+ active podcasts.
opportunities.moat: Podcast + social account OAuth creates stickiness; quality compounds as model learns client's style
opportunities.first_step: Build Whisper + Claude pipeline for clip identification; integrate with CapCut API for captions; launch ProductHunt
opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI identifies highest-engagement moments in 60-min episode in 30 seconds — finding emotional resonance, not just facts

competitors.name: Descript
competitors.weakness: $12–$24/mo but requires manual clip selection; just a video editor with transcription; no AI clip finder

competitors.name: Opus Clip
competitors.weakness: $19–$79/mo; YouTube/video focused; basic AI selection; no social scheduling; limited to short-form

competitors.name: Castmagic
competitors.weakness: $39–$99/mo; transcription + show notes, not clip generation with captions

opportunities.gap: Opus Clip does short-form video clips but not podcasts specifically. No tool finds the best podcast clips AND auto-creates captioned videos AND schedules them across platforms in one workflow.
poc_steps: Pick any podcast episode (MP3 from RSS feed)
Prompt Claude: 'identify the 5 most engaging 90-second segments from this transcript that would go viral on LinkedIn'
Show the podcaster the 5 clips with timestamps
Charge $99/mo to do this every week automatically

opportunities.title: AI-Generated Niche Data Report Business
opportunities.how_money_is_made: Pick a niche (SaaS, VC, real estate). Scrape pricing pages, job postings, app reviews, Reddit/HN. Use LLM to synthesize into monthly 15-page reports with charts. Sell $99–$499/mo or $2,500 per report.
opportunities.moat: Historical report database + subscriber community drives word-of-mouth; longitudinal data is unique
opportunities.first_step: Scrape SaaS pricing pages from G2/Capterra (500 companies); generate 1 test report; post as free download on LinkedIn
opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI synthesizes 500+ data points into narrative insights — replacing a team of analysts

competitors.name: Gartner / Forrester
competitors.weakness: $10k–$50k per report; enterprise only; slow cadence; outdated by the time published

competitors.name: CB Insights
competitors.weakness: $25k–$50k/yr; great data but very expensive; not accessible to most buyers

competitors.name: G2 Reports
competitors.weakness: Review-based only; no pricing/market intelligence; free but shallow

opportunities.gap: Startups and mid-market companies need market intelligence but can't afford Gartner. AI can now produce Gartner-quality reports at 1% of the cost. The $99–$499/mo niche report subscription doesn't exist at scale.
poc_steps: Choose a niche you know: e.g., 'SaaS pricing benchmarks'
Manually pull pricing from 50 SaaS company websites in 2 hours
Use Claude to synthesize: 'write a 5-page report on SaaS pricing trends from this data'
Post on LinkedIn as free download and collect 100+ email signups
